description_long: This is a weathered, cylindrical metal bucket with a single rounded handle attached to one side. The surface is mottled with patches of rust and discoloration, giving it a rugged, aged appearance typical of objects exposed to the elements. The interior appears dark and similarly worn, suggesting frequent use or long-term outdoor storage. The handle is robust and made of the same metal as the body, showing signs of oxidation and wear. The rim is slightly thickened, providing structural integrity and a comfortable grip. There are no visible labels, markings, or reinforcements, and the bucket is open at the top with no lid present.
description: A weathered, rusted metal bucket with a single rounded side handle and an open top, showing signs of heavy use and exposure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top and cylindrical body, with the handle not visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the rounded metal handle attached to the right side and the bucket's open mouth.
description_view_2: Rear angled view highlighting the attachment point and curvature of the handle, with the bucket's surface texture visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle on the left and the bucket's worn, mottled exterior.
